description.value: The first time you are reduced below half your maximum Hit Points each combat, attempt a Will save against your temptation DC or be compelled to Strike the nearest creature (allies included) for 1 round. While below half your maximum Hit Points, you are doomed 1.

rules.title: Slipping Control
rules.text: First time reduced below half HP each combat: Will vs temptation DC or compelled to Strike the nearest creature (allies included) for 1 round. Doomed 1 while below half HP.
